name: File Lock Management
description: Tracks which files are locked by which tasks and coordinates task queuing when file conflicts exist. Prevents concurrent file mutations and Git operations from colliding.

Managers/FileLockManager.cs.content:
class FileLockManager
  LockCount: int
  ReleaseTaskLocks(string taskId) -> void
  IsFileLocked(string normalizedPath) -> bool
  GetTaskLockedFiles(string taskId) -> HashSet<string>
  CheckQueuedTasks(ObservableCollection<AgentTask> activeTasks) -> void
  ForceStartQueuedTask(AgentTask task) -> void
  AddQueuedTaskInfo(string taskId, QueuedTaskInfo info) -> void
  RemoveQueuedInfo(string taskId) -> void
  ClearAll() -> void
  SetGitOperationInProgress(bool inProgress) -> void
  TryExtractFilePathFromPartial(string partialJson) -> string?
  ExtractFilePath(JsonElement input) -> string?

patterns: Automatic queue re-evaluation on lock release
